examples: Social imbalance worries him more than inequity of income.
The illness is triggered by a chemical imbalance in the brain.
The trade imbalance is likely to rise again in 2007. Hence a new set of policy actions will be required soon.
And the baby boomers are living longer, creating an imbalance between workers and retired.
Moreover, insider trading laws imbalance markets by effectively regulating only one-half of the trading equation.
